verse.verse_3: Fī adnal-arḍi wa hum mim ba‘di galabihim sayaglibūn(a).
verse.verse_4: Fī biḍ‘i sinīn(a), lillāhil-amru min qablu wa mim ba‘d(u), wa yauma'iżiy yafraḥul-mu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_5: Binaṣrillāh(i), yanṣuru may yasyā'(u), wa huwal-‘azīzur-raḥīm(u).
verse.verse_6: Wa‘dallāh(i), lā yukhlifullāhu wa‘dahū wa lākinna akṡaran-nāsi lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_7: Ya‘lamūna ẓāhiram minal-ḥayātid-dun-yā, wa hum ‘anil-ākhirati hum gāfilūn(a).
verse.verse_8: Awalam yatafakkarū fī anfusihim, mā khalaqallāhus-samāwāti wal-arḍa wa mā bainahumā illā bil-ḥaqqi wa ajalim musammā(n), wa inna kaṡīram minan-nāsi biliqā'i rabbihim lakāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_9: Awalam yasīrū fil-arḍi fayanẓurū kaifa kāna ‘āqibatul-lażīna min qablihim, kānū asyadda minhum quwwataw wa aṡārul-arḍa wa ‘amarūhā akṡara mimmā ‘amarūhā wa jā'athum rusuluhum bil-bayyināt(i), famā kānallāhu liyaẓlimahum wa lākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūn(a).
verse.verse_10: Ṡumma kāna ‘āqibatal-lażīna asā'us-sū'ā an każżabū bi'āyātillāhi wa kānū bihā yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_11: Allāhu yabda'ul-khalqa ṡumma yu‘īduhū ṡumma ilaihi turja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_13: Wa lam yakul lahum min syurakā'ihim syufa‘ā'u wa kānū bisyurakā'ihim kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_15: Fa ammal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti fahum fī rauḍatiy yuḥbarūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Wa ammal-lażīna kafarū wa każżabū bi'āyātinā wa liqā'il-ākhirati fa'ulā'ika fil-‘ażābi muḥḍarūn(a).
verse.verse_17: Fa subḥānallāhi ḥīna tumsūna wa ḥīna tuṣbiḥūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Wa lahul-ḥamdu fis-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa ‘asyiyyaw wa ḥīna tuẓhirūn(a).
verse.verse_19: Yukhrijul-ḥayya minal-mayyiti wa yukhrijul-mayyita minal-ḥayyi wa yuḥyil-arḍa ba‘da mautihā, wa każālika tukhrajūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Wa min āyātihī an khalaqakum min turābin ṡumma iżā antum basyarun tantasyirūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Wa min āyātihī an khalaqa lakum min anfusikum azwājal litaskunū ilaihā wa ja‘ala bainakum mawaddataw wa raḥmah(tan), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy yatafakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Wa min āyātihī khalqus-samāwāti wal-arḍi wakhtilāfu alsinatikum wa alwānikum, inna fī żālika la'āyātil lil-‘ālimīn(a).
verse.verse_23: Wa min āyātihī manāmukum bil-laili wan-nahāri wabtigā'ukum min faḍlih(ī), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy yasma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_24: Wa min āyātihī yurīkumul-barqa khaufaw wa ṭama‘aw wa yunazzilu minas-samā'i mā'an fa yuḥyī bihil-arḍa ba‘da mautihā, inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_25: Wa min āyātihī an taqūmas-samā'u wal-arḍu bi'amrih(ī), ṡumma iżā da‘ākum da‘watam minal-arḍi iżā antum takhrujūn(a).
verse.verse_26: Wa lahū man fis-samāwāti wal-arḍ(i), kullul lahū qānitūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Wa huwal-lażī yabda'ul-khalqa ṡumma yu‘īduhū wa huwa ahwanu ‘alaih(i), wa lahul-maṡalul-a‘lā fis-samāwāti wal-arḍ(i), wa huwal-‘azīzul-ḥakīm(u).
verse.verse_28: Ḍaraba lakum maṡalam min anfusikum, hal lakum mim mā malakat aimānukum min syurakā'a fī mā razaqnākum fa'antum fīhi sawā'un takhāfūnahum kakhīfatikum anfusakum, każālika nufaṣṣilul-āyāti liqaumiy ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Balittaba‘al-lażīna ẓalamū ahwā'ahum bigairi ‘ilm(in), famay yahdī man aḍallallāh(u), wa mā lahum min nāṣirīn(a).
verse.verse_30: Fa aqim wajhaka lid-dīni ḥanīfā(n), fiṭratallāhil-latī faṭaran-nāsa ‘alaihā, lā tabdīla likhalqillāh(i), żālikad-dīnul-qayyim(u), wa lākinna akṡaran-nāsi lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_31: Munībīna ilaihi wattaqūhu wa aqīmuṣ-ṣalāta wa lā takūnū minal-musyrikīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Minal-lażīna farraqū dīnahum wa kānū syiya‘ā(n), kullu ḥizbim bimā ladaihim fariḥūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Wa iżā massan-nāsa ḍurrun da‘au rabbahum munībīna ilaihi ṡumma iżā ażāqahum minhu raḥmatan iżā farīqum minhum birabbihim yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Liyakfurū bimā ātaināhum, fatamatta‘ū, fasaufa ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_35: Am anzalnā ‘alaihim sulṭānan fahuwa yatakallamu bimā kānū bihī yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Wa iżā ażaqnan-nāsa raḥmatan fariḥū bihā, wa in tuṣibhum sayyi'atum bimā qaddamat aidīhim iżā hum yaqnaṭūn(a).
verse.verse_37: Awalam yarau annallāha yabsuṭur-rizqa limay yasyā'u wa yaqdir(u), inna fī żālika la'āyātil liqaumiy yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Fa āti żal-qurbā ḥaqqahū wal-miskīna wabnas-sabīl(i), żālika khairul lil-lażīna yurīdūna wajhallāh(i), wa ulā'ika humul-mufliḥūn(a).
verse.verse_39: Wa mā ātaitum mir ribal liyarbuwa fī amwālin-nāsi falā yarbū ‘indallāh(i), wa mā ātaitum min zakātin turīdūna wajhallāhi fa'ulā'ika humul-muḍ‘ifūn(a).
verse.verse_40: Allāhul-lażī khalaqakum ṡumma razaqakum ṡumma yumītukum ṡumma yuḥyīkum, hal min syurakā'ikum may yaf‘alu min żālikum min syai'(in), subḥānahū wa ta‘ālā ‘ammā yusyrikūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Żaharal-fasādu fil-barri wal-baḥri bimā kasabat aidin-nāsi liyużīqahum ba‘ḍal-lażī ‘amilū la‘allahum yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_42: Qul sīrū fil-arḍi fanẓurū kaifa kāna ‘āqibatul-lażīna min qabl(u), kāna akṡaruhum musyrikīn(a).
verse.verse_43: Fa aqim wajhaka lid-dīnil-qayyimi min qabli ay ya'tiya yaumul lā maradda lahū minallāhi yauma'iżiy yaṣṣadda‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Man kafara fa ‘alaihi kufruh(ū), wa man ‘amila ṣāliḥan fali'anfusihim yamhadūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Liyajziyal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti min faḍlih(ī), innahū lā yuḥibbul-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_46: Wa min āyātihī ay yursilar-riyāḥa mubasysyirātiw wa liyużīqakum mir raḥmatihī wa litajriyal-fulka bi'amrihī wa litabtagū min faḍlihī wa la‘allakum tasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_47: Wa laqad arsalnā min qablika rusulan ilā qaumihim fajā'ūhum bil-bayyināti fantaqamnā minal-lażīna ajramū, wa kāna ḥaqqan ‘alainā naṣrul-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_48: Allāhul-lażī yursilur-riyāḥa fatuṡīru saḥāban fayabsuṭuhū fis-samā'i kaifa yasyā'u wa yaj‘aluhū kisafan fataral-wadqa yakhruju min khilālih(ī), fa'iżā aṣāba bihī may yasyā'u min ‘ibādihī iżā hum yastabsyirūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Wa in kānū min qabli ay yunazzala ‘alaihim min qablihī lamublisīn(a).
verse.verse_50: Fanẓur ilā āṡāri raḥmatillāhi kaifa yuḥyil-arḍa ba‘da mautihā, inna żālika lamuḥyil-mautā, wa huwa ‘alā kulli syai'in qadīr(un).
verse.verse_51: Wa la'in arsalnā rīḥan fara'auhu muṣfarral laẓallū mim ba‘dihī yakfurūn(a).
verse.verse_52: Fa innaka lā tusmi‘ul-mautā wa lā tusmi‘uṣ-ṣummad-du‘ā'a iżā wallau mudbirīn(a).
verse.verse_53: Wa mā anta bihādil-‘umyi ‘an ḍalālatihim, in tusmi‘u illā may yu'minu bi'āyātinā fahum muslimūn(a).
verse.verse_54: Allāhul-lażī khalaqakum min ḍa‘fin ṡumma ja‘ala mim ba‘di ḍa‘fin quwwatan ṡumma ja‘ala mim ba‘di quwwatin ḍa‘faw wa syaibah(tan), yakhluqu mā yasyā'(u), wa huwal-‘alīmul-qadīr(u).
verse.verse_55: Wa yauma taqūmus-sā‘atu yuqsimul-mujrimūn(a), mā labiṡū gaira sā‘ah(tin), każālika kānū yu'fakūn(a).
verse.verse_56: Wa qālal-lażīna ūtul-‘ilma wal-īmāna laqad labiṡtum fī kitābillāhi ilā yaumil-ba‘ṡ(i), fa hāżā yaumul-baṡi wa lākinnakum kuntum lā ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_57: Fa yauma'iżil lā yanfa‘ul-lażīna ẓalamū ma‘żiratuhum wa lā hum yusta‘tabūn(a).
verse.verse_58: Wa laqad ḍarabnā lin-nāsi fī hāżal-qur'āni min kulli maṡal(in), wa la'in ji'tahum bi'āyatil layaqūlannal-lażīna kafarū in antum illā mubṭilūn(a).
verse.verse_60: Faṣbir inna wa‘dallāhi ḥaqquw wa lā yastakhiffannakal-lażīna lā yūqinūn(a).
